enaBalance.description: ENA balance held in the silo (bounds withdraw cap)

usdeBalance.description: USDe balance held in the silo (bounds withdraw cap)

rewarderRoleMembers.description: REWARDER_ROLE holders (auto-crawled). Companion field to surface legit holders without pulling in BLACKLISTED_ROLE blacklist.

pendingDefaultAdmin.description: SingleAdminAccessControl._pendingDefaultAdmin (private storage on upgradeable layout); acceptAdmin caller

rewarderRoleMembers.description: REWARDER_ROLE holders (auto-crawled). Companion field to surface legit holders without pulling in FULL_RESTRICTED_STAKER_ROLE blacklist. roleNames duplicated here because sUSDe declares role constants as `private`, so the handler's ABI-based name auto-detection finds nothing.

usdeBalance.description: USDe held by this contract (bounds rescueTokens worst-case drain)
